scripts.dev:web: corepack pnpm --filter @otc/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter web dev
scripts.dev:api: corepack pnpm --filter @otc/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @otc/prompts build && corepack pnpm --filter api start:dev
scripts.test:api-contract: corepack pnpm --filter @otc/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @otc/prompts build && corepack pnpm --filter api build && node --test scripts/api/*.test.mjs
scripts.test: corepack pnpm test:retrieval && corepack pnpm test:api-contract && corepack pnpm -r lint
